We need to interpret sentiment: The data shows probabilities for Bitcoin reaching certain price levels. For July: reaching $72,500 only 5% yes, $70k 15%, $67.5k 49% yes. So moderate chance to reach $67.5k. Also "Bitcoin Up or Down on July 24?: Yes 71%" meaning probability of up? The phrasing "Yes" likely means "Will be up?" So 71% chance up on July 24. For long term dip to $40k by end 2026: 17% yes; to $50k: 30%; to $35k: 10%. So low probability of deep dip. Overall sentiment seems moderately bullish: higher chance of up short term, moderate chance to reach $67.5k, low chance of deep dip. So we can say Bullish.

polymarket.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Israel x Iran ceasefire continues through July 25?
Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by July 31?
Will Mojtaba Khamenei be head of state in Iran end of 2026?
Mitch McConnell steps down from Senate before his term ends?
Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $95 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on data. The data includes Fed rates: high probability of no change (74%) vs increase 25bps (25%). So expectation of stable rates (bullish for equities). Israel-Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 76% yes (positive for stability). US invade Iran before 2027: 30% low (low risk). Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control: only 3% (unlikely). Mojtaba Khamenei head of state end 2026: 72% yes (expect continuity). Mitch McConnell steps down: 41% (uncertain). WTI crude hit $95 in July: 66% yes (expect higher oil prices, could be inflationary but also indicates demand). Overall sentiment seems moderately bullish: stable Fed, ceasefire, low invasion risk, continuity in Iran leadership, oil price up. Mixed? The only bearish signals: Mitch McConnell step down 41% (some political uncertainty), Kharg Island low 3% (but that's not bearish). Overall likely Bullish.

We need to mention numbers and names where available. Keep within 80 words.
